user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view candidates at the Appointment Letter stage with full details including interview status of Joined, so that I can process appointment letters for joined hires
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appointment Letter screen; When the list loads; Then joined candidates are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can quickly find a specific hire needing an appointment letter
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appointment Letter screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the appointment letter list, so that I see the most recent joined candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appointment Letter screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate hiring stage filters such as Joined, Offered and Accepted, so that I can move between pipeline stages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appointment Letter screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the item count and pagination for the joined candidates, so that I can confirm how many appointment letters are pending
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appointment Letter screen; When the list has multiple candidates; Then the displayed item range and count are shown
